author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.4 "In Ravages Does the Whistle Sound" Special Program
The Honkai: Star Rail Version 4.4 "In Ravages Does the Whistle Sound" Special Program will release on 2026/07/03 19:30 (UTC+8).

"The Navigator charts a course to the apocalypse. A mournful whistle howls, and only those of the Trailblaze can find a path to survival across the realm of death..."
-Oh? Is that so.

This special program will feature a character introduction for Himeko • Nova, as well as details on the collaboration between Honkai: Star Rail and Fate/stay night [Unlimited Blade Works]!
-Don't forget to come back and visit ^~^.

#HonkaiStarRail #HSRSpecialProgram
